textByHash.1de7364bd1342283f66e27d9add41799e6ed0bd0: Patients, patients everywhere! We need to get these soldiers up and fighting again!
textByHash.cbdeeb6c074eac82a9e07029823ed52a99fea34d: I don't have time to chat, I have patients to attend to.
textByHash.3ababbe4843388476c1b3bda35b58ec8653ed596: I can't take much more of this. As soon as we help one patient, another comes in!
textByHash.0db0b11899001ab246659c3620279ca37a584e80: Patients, patients everywhere! We need all the help we can get to get these soldiers up and fighting again. Can you help us?
textByHash.444379d9efec8de5de774f050ff175db038f5192: Firstly, you're going to need to gather some medpacks. There should be plenty of boxes around here with some in.
textByHash.976f16cfb147f3e712e5d824d50850d37a643886: After you've got some, we have several tents full of soldiers who've been hurt in the battle against the lizardmen.
textByHash.ef78847cca1dfbda3cf64de638bbe4e6068dae22: Good, you have already found some medpacks. Now, we have several tents full of soldiers who've been hurt in the battle against the lizardmen.
textByHash.09a0d981d0ffd5f388260da9eb69629fedf77ee3: If you could help them out with those medpacks, that would be a massive help.
textByHash.0ee8d9965dc9720eb7e43a654ce0a870a1ab6fa5: The people of Shayzien will thank you.
